description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in a form-fitting athletic suit with a striking two-tone design, featuring a prominent V-shaped neckline and long sleeves. The suit is primarily dark with bold contrasting panels running down the sides, arms, and legs, accentuating the contours of the body. The figure has shoulder-length, softly curled hair styled with a side part, and her facial features are clearly defined. Her arms are extended outward, with one arm bent at the elbow and the other reaching forward, suggesting a dynamic or gestural pose. She is wearing matching athletic footwear that blends seamlessly with the suit. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for urban or active environments.
description: A female adult in a sleek, form-fitting athletic suit with shoulder-length styled hair, posed with arms extended. The outfit and stance suggest an active, urban context.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neckline, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the suit's side panel, arm extended forward, and profile of the face and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, hair, and the arm positions from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view with the right arm fully extended, showing the suit's side panel and hair profile.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear bodysuit with long sleeves and V-neckline
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length wavy hair with side part
